company: Deutsche Post und DHL Group (Post & Paket Deutschland)
title: Senior Product Owner Data & AI (Customer Analytics) (m/w/d)
required_skills: Abgeschlossenes Studium in Data Science, Informatik, Statistik
Erfahrung mit großen, auch unstrukturierten Datenmengen
missing_skills: Product Owner role or data product ownership
Strong German skills (candidate is B1, role requires near-native proficiency)
Use case identification and prioritisation at senior level
core_responsibilities: Identifikation, Bewertung und Priorisierung daten- und KI-getriebener Use Cases
Übersetzung fachlicher Anforderungen in Epics, User Stories, Roadmaps und Backlogs
Steuerung cross-funktionaler Teams (Data Science, Data Engineering, BI, Fachbereiche)
Explorative Analysen, Prototypen und KPIs (Python, SQL, Power BI); Begleitung von Data Products im produktiven Betrieb
recommended_emphasis: Highlight SQL and Python usage with concrete project examples to demonstrate hands-on data work
Emphasise any cross-functional coordination and stakeholder communication experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC)
Frame HSBC PMO role in terms of backlog/prioritisation to approximate Product Owner adjacent skills
Mention Power BI and KPI reporting as evidence of data product delivery mindset
Acknowledge German language improvement efforts if applicable; B1 is a significant gap for this role

company_info.size_raw: Deutsche Post DHL Group — globally known enterprise; 10,001+ employees inferred from brand recognition and group structure
